title: German Semolina Cake
description: A classic German semolina cake, moist and flavorful, perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 9-inch round cake pan and set aside.
In a medium bowl, whisk together semolina, flour, and sugar.
In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, and melted butter.
Add vanilla extract and whisk until combined.
Gradually add dry ingredients to wet ingredients and whisk until smooth.
Pour batter into prepared cake pan and smooth top.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Remove from oven and let cool in pan for 5 minutes.
Transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
